select_when: The audience lacks a usable schema for the concept but does have adjacent experience that can carry the explanation.
Abstraction is blocking understanding even though the underlying idea is sound.
The mechanism can transfer through a comparison that preserves the important structural logic of the target domain.
The main bottleneck is making the idea graspable, memorable, and discussable rather than adding more facts.
avoid_when: The comparison is catchy but distorts the structural boundaries of the target domain.
Layered metaphors are adding interpretation burden instead of reducing it.

curation_notes.summary: Focused on schema transfer and anti-jargon clarity rather than on rhetorical flourish.
donor_drops: Did not preserve donor communication sprawl because the raw source is already strongest on structural transfer and explanation quality.
open_questions: The source overlaps with teaching and product positioning, but the operational file stays on graspability and structural transfer.

select_when.note: The raw source is explicit on missing schema, abstraction blockage, and structural transfer.

avoid_when.note: The source explicitly warns about distorted transfer and excessive metaphor burden.

input_type.note: The typed input label compresses the raw explanatory activation conditions.

output_type.note: The output label compresses structural-comparison logic into a reusable intervention type.

reasoning_types.note: The model clearly relies on analogy and reflective explanation, but the taxonomy labels remain reviewed normalization.
